column1: Attributed Year is the estimated period when the story or motif entered oral tradition, not just when it was published.
Location refers to the region of origin or where the tale is most strongly associated.
Culture and Language reflect the primary ethnic group and language of the earliest or most canonical version.
Many of these tales have ancient roots and exist in multiple cultures; the table focuses on the most influential or well-documented variants.
If you want to expand this further to include additional motifs, regions, or a particular tradition, just let me know!
